words.def: after death the soul begins a new cycle of existence in another human body
words.zh: n. 再生, 復活, 新生

words.def: the time when something begins (especially life)
neckwear consisting of a long narrow piece of material worn (mostly by men) under a collar and tied in knot at the front
words.zh: n. 帶子, 線, 鞋帶, 領帶, 領結, 關係, 束縛, 平局, 不分勝負

words.def: (baseball) a successful stroke in an athletic contest (especially in baseball)
words.zh: n. 打擊, 打, 衝撞, 諷刺

words.def: a small piece or quantity of something
words.zh: n. 少量, 馬嚼子, 輔幣

words.def: the money risked on a gamble
